title: Extracting Product Information from PDF Catalogs Using OCR
scenario: Extract product information from PDF catalogs using Optical Character Recognition (OCR). The PDF files may contain multiple pages, images, and tables. The target LLM output should be a list of JSON objects, each representing a product with its corresponding description, price, and image URL.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the extracted product information in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Check if the generated JSON output accurately extracts product information using OCR.
